........
匣中乍破千山雪，劫外犹悬万壑雷。
愿以一剑杀万劫，横扫寰宇荡世间!
........
天下之大，寰宇四方。
九州八极，海域仙山。
常有仙迹显圣，求仙问道之风亦在人间兴盛。
求仙访道之人更是多如枯树干里的蚂蚁。
玄门正宗，左道旁道。
诸子百家，天外邪魔……
故此，灵山无数，妙境星罗。
这一切从游侠儿刘锋，被引入太玄仙宗说起......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/78f8f0bcde6c93ba613b83bda589bfb8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"暴戾72","author_id":"","book_id":"7593348603385498648","book_name":"剑锋！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2268人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7593348693261025816","read_count":"2268","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"809475"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"284","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/78f8f0bcde6c93ba613b83bda589bfb8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430745&x-signature=101w5uuYOg0Nzlwe5wml%2BBoDxYQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1025209179059656","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"43"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231419059CD45D5491A12FE7D98E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13436,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":386},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608551808099451673","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有点真正仙家气象，是我想象中的修仙！"},"content_type":0,
